---
title: "volcano_species"
author: "Ruwen Zhou"
date: "7/26/2024"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)

library(readr)
library(plyr)
library(tidyverse)
library(dplyr)
library(readxl)
library(ggplot2)
library(phyloseq)
library(vegan)
library(DESeq2)
library(pheatmap)
library(RColorBrewer)
```


#demographic
```{r}
# helios_core = read_excel("data/HELIOS_Core_redacted.xlsx")
# metadata_micro = read_csv("data/metadata_fil_01032024_redacted.csv")
# sample_list = metadata_micro$`Original Sample name`
# helios_new <- filter(helios_core, FREG1_Barcode %in% sample_list)
```
#food nutrition
```{r}
# FFQ_food = read_xlsx("data/HELIOS_FFQA.xlsx")
# FFQ_nutrition = read_xlsx("data/HELIOS_FFQB.xlsx")
# pid_list = helios_new$FREG0_PID
# food_new = filter(FFQ_food, FREG0_PID %in% pid_list)
# nutrition_new = filter(FFQ_nutrition, FREG0_PID %in% pid_list)
```
#species
```{r}
# species = read_csv("data/abundance_bracken_standard_16_20221209_taxa_S_unfiltered_reads_decont2.csv")
# #species$`SAM id`
# helios_new_list = helios_new$FREG1_Barcode
# #sample_list = metadata_micro$`Original Sample name`
# micro_list <- filter(metadata_micro, metadata_micro$`Original Sample name` %in% helios_new_list)
# species_new = filter(species, species$`SAM id` %in% micro_list$`Library ID`)
# species_new
```

```{r}
# new_merge = merge(metadata_micro, species_new, by.x = "Library ID", by.y = "SAM id")
# #new_merge
# species_meta = merge(x = helios_new[,c("FREG1_Barcode", "DLAB27_Hba1C_Percent", "DLAB25_Gluf_Mmol_L", "FREG5_Ethnic_Group","FREG10_Fasting_Hours","FBP16_Caffeine")], y = new_merge, by.y = "Original Sample name", by.x = "FREG1_Barcode")
# species_meta = species_meta %>% drop_na(DLAB27_Hba1C_Percent)
# species_meta
```

```{r}
# metadata = species_meta[, c("FREG1_Barcode", "DLAB27_Hba1C_Percent","DLAB25_Gluf_Mmol_L", "FREG5_Ethnic_Group","FREG10_Fasting_Hours", "FBP16_Caffeine")]
# metadata
# drop = c("DLAB27_Hba1C_Percent", "Library ID", "SampleType", "seq_batch", "DLAB25_Gluf_Mmol_L", "FREG5_Ethnic_Group","FREG10_Fasting_Hours", "FBP16_Caffeine")
# species_data = species_meta[,!(names(species_meta) %in% drop)]
# species_data
```

```{r}
# metadata = metadata[!duplicated(metadata$FREG1_Barcode), ]
# species_data = species_data[!duplicated(species_data$FREG1_Barcode), ]
# species_data
# metadata
```
# import 800 data species
```{r}
species_data_800 = read_excel("data/species_866.xlsx")
ethnicity_800 = read_excel("data/ethnicity_866.xlsx")
species_data_800
ethnicity_800
```



```{r}

drop_rare_species <- function(df, threshold = 0.1) {
  # Calculate the number of samples
  num_samples <- nrow(df)
  
  # Calculate the threshold count
  threshold_count <- num_samples * threshold
  
  # Find columns where the species is present in at least the threshold_count samples
  species_to_keep <- sapply(df, function(col) sum(col > 0) >= threshold_count)
  
  # Subset the dataframe to keep only those species
  df_filtered <- df[, species_to_keep]
  
  return(df_filtered)
}

# Apply the function to your dataframe
species_data_800 <- drop_rare_species(species_data_800)
species_data_800
```

```{r}
# rownames(species_data) = species_data[,1]
# species_data[1] = NULL
# rownames(metadata) = metadata[,1]
# species_data
# metadata
```

```{r}
merged_data <- merge(ethnicity_800[,c("FREG1_Barcode", "FREG5_Ethnic_Group")], species_data_800, by.x = "FREG1_Barcode", by.y = "FREG1_Barcode",  all = FALSE)
merged_data = subset(merged_data, FREG5_Ethnic_Group != "O")
merged_data
```

# Volcano plot
```{r}
data_C <- merged_data[merged_data$FREG5_Ethnic_Group == "C", -(1:2)]
data_I <- merged_data[merged_data$FREG5_Ethnic_Group == "I", -(1:2)]
data_M <- merged_data[merged_data$FREG5_Ethnic_Group == "M", -(1:2)]

# Adding a small constant to avoid log2(0) issues
data_C[data_C == 0] <- 1e-6
data_I[data_I == 0] <- 1e-6
data_M[data_M == 0] <- 1e-6

data_IM <- rbind(data_I, data_M)
data_CM <- rbind(data_C, data_M)
data_CI <- rbind(data_C, data_I)

calculate_stats <- function(data1, data2) {
  logFC <- numeric(ncol(data1))
  p_values <- numeric(ncol(data1))
  
  for (i in 1:ncol(data1)) {
    mean1 <- mean(data1[, i], na.rm = TRUE)
    mean2 <- mean(data2[, i], na.rm = TRUE)
    logFC[i] <- log2(mean2 / mean1)
    
    if (sd(data1[, i], na.rm = TRUE) == 0 || sd(data2[, i], na.rm = TRUE) == 0) {
      p_values[i] <- 1
    } else {
      p_values[i] <- t.test(data1[, i], data2[, i])$p.value
    }
  }
  
  results <- data.frame(
    species = colnames(data1),
    logFC = logFC,
    p_value = p_values
  )
  
  results$logP = -log10(results$p_value)
  results <- results[results$logP > 0, ]  # Filter out rows with logP = 0
  return(results)
}


# Calculate stats for each pairwise comparison
results_CvsIM <- calculate_stats(data_C, data_IM)
results_IvsCM <- calculate_stats(data_I, data_CM)
results_MvsCI <- calculate_stats(data_M, data_CI)

# Function to plot volcano plot
plot_volcano <- function(results, title) {
  ggplot(results, aes(x = logFC, y = logP)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.5) +
    theme_minimal() +
    ggtitle(title) +
    xlab("Log2 Fold Change") +
    ylab("-Log10 P-Value") +
    geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(0.05), linetype = "dashed", color = "red") +
    geom_vline(xintercept = c(-1, 1), linetype = "dashed", color = "red")
}

# Plot the volcano plots
plot_volcano(results_CvsIM, "Volcano Plot: Chinese vs Non-Chinese")
plot_volcano(results_IvsCM, "Volcano Plot: Indian vs Non-Indian")
plot_volcano(results_MvsCI, "Volcano Plot: Malay vs Non-Malay")

```
```{r}
# Function to plot volcano plot with colored significant points
plot_volcano <- function(results, title) {
  # Define significance thresholds
  sig_threshold <- 0.05
  lfc_threshold <- 1
  
  results$significance <- "Not Significant"
  results$significance[results$p_value < sig_threshold & results$logFC > lfc_threshold] <- "Up"
  results$significance[results$p_value < sig_threshold & results$logFC < -lfc_threshold] <- "Down"
  
  ggplot(results, aes(x = logFC, y = logP, color = significance)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.5) +
    theme_minimal() +
    ggtitle(title) +
    xlab("Log2 Fold Change") +
    ylab("-Log10 P-Value") +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("Up" = "red", "Down" = "blue", "Not Significant" = "black")) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(sig_threshold), linetype = "dashed", color = "red") +
    geom_vline(xintercept = c(-lfc_threshold, lfc_threshold), linetype = "dashed", color = "red")
}

# Plot the volcano plots with colored significant points
plot_volcano(results_CvsIM, "Volcano Plot: Chinese vs Non-Chinese")
plot_volcano(results_IvsCM, "Volcano Plot: Indian vs Non-Indian")
plot_volcano(results_MvsCI, "Volcano Plot: Malay vs Non-Malay")

```

```{r}
library(ggrepel)


plot_volcano <- function(results, title) {

  sig_threshold <- 0.05
  lfc_threshold <- 1
  
  results$significance <- "Not Significant"
  results$significance[results$p_value < sig_threshold & results$logFC > lfc_threshold] <- "Up"
  results$significance[results$p_value < sig_threshold & results$logFC < -lfc_threshold] <- "Down"
  

  labeled_results <- results %>%
    filter(significance != "Not Significant")
  
  ggplot(results, aes(x = logFC, y = logP, color = significance)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.8) +
    theme_minimal() +
    ggtitle(title) +
    xlab("Log2 Fold Change") +
    ylab("-Log10 P-Value") +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("Up" = "#8D3256", "Down" = "#004697", "Not Significant" = "grey")) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(sig_threshold), linetype = "dashed", color = "red") +
    geom_vline(xintercept = c(-lfc_threshold, lfc_threshold), linetype = "dashed", color = "red") +
    #geom_text(data = labeled_results, aes(label = species), size = 3, box.padding = 0.3)
    geom_text_repel(data = labeled_results, aes(label = species), size = 3, box.padding = 0.3, max.overlaps = 20)
}

plot_volcano(results_CvsIM, "Volcano Plot: Chinese vs Non-Chinese")
plot_volcano(results_IvsCM, "Volcano Plot: Indian vs Non-Indian")
plot_volcano(results_MvsCI, "Volcano Plot: Malay vs Non-Malay")

```





```{r}
png("figure/volcano_species800_C.png", width = 1400, height = 1000, res = 120)
plot_volcano(results_CvsIM, "Volcano Plot: Chinese vs Non-Chinese")
dev.off()
png("figure/volcano_species800_M.png", width = 1400, height = 1000, res = 120)
plot_volcano(results_MvsCI, "Volcano Plot: Malay vs Non-Malay")
dev.off()
png("figure/volcano_species800_I.png", width = 1400, height = 1000, res = 120)
plot_volcano(results_IvsCM, "Volcano Plot: Indian vs Non-Indian")
dev.off()
```
